memoryArtifacts.headline: John Parker Sr.
memoryArtifacts.description: John Parker Sr. was born 25 Sep 1568 in Georgeham, Devon, England. His father was James Parker. His brother William was a privateer and John  accompanied him on Drake's raid on Cadiz smashing the Span …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Parker Sr.於1568年3月20日出生在英國戴文格奧智哈姆時，他的父親James Parker33歲，母親Margery Patch33歲。他於1600年9月25日與Katherine Dennis在英國英格蘭戴文格奧智哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1636年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克比德福德比德福德 普爾。他去世於1651年10月在美國緬因州薩加達可格奧智托享年83歲，埋葬在美國緬因州薩加達可格奧智托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Parker Sr.于1568年3月20日出生在英国戴文格奧智哈姆时，他的父亲James Parker33岁，母亲Margery Patch33岁。他于1600年9月25日与Katherine Dennis在英国英格兰戴文格奧智哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1636年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克比德福德比德福德 普爾。他去世于1651年10月在美国缅因州薩加達可格奧智托享年83岁，埋葬在美国缅因州薩加達可格奧智托。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Parker Sr. was born on 20 March 1568, in Georgeham, Devon, England, his father, James Parker, was 33 and his mother, Margery Patch, was 33. He married Katherine Dennis on 25 September 1600, in Georgeham, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Biddeford Pool, Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1636. He died in October 1651, in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, United States, at the age of 83, and was buried in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Parker Sr. est né le 20 mars 1568, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, James Parker, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery Patch, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Dennis le 25 septembre 1600, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Biddeford Pool, Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1636. Il est décédé en octobre 1651, à Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Parker Sr. am 20. März 1568 in Georgeham, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Parker 33 und seine Mutter Margery Patch 33. Er hat am 25. September 1600 in Georgeham, Devon, England, United Kingdom Katherine Dennis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1636 hat er in Biddeford Pool, Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb im Oktober 1651 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Parker Sr. è nato il il 20 marzo 1568 nel Georgeham, Devon, England, il suo padre, James Parker, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margery Patch, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Dennis il 25 settembre 1600, nel Georgeham, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Biddeford Pool, Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1636. Morì nel ottobre 1651, nel Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Parker Sr.が1568年3月20日にイギリスデボンジョージェハムで生まれた時，父James Parkerは33歳，母Margery Patchは33歳であった。1600年9月25日にイギリスイギリスデボンジョージェハムでKatherine Dennisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1636年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークビッドエフォードビッドエフォード ポオルに住んでいた。彼は1651年10月にアメリカ合衆国メイン州サゲアダホックジョージェトウンで83歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州サゲアダホックジョージェトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Parker Sr.(이)가 1568년 3월 20일 영국 데폰 조그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Parker(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Patch(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1600년 9월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 조그함에서 Katherine Dennis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1636년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 비데퍼드 비데퍼드 포에서 살았다. 그는 1651년 10월 미국 메인 주 사가다호크 조짓운에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 사가다호크 조짓운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Parker Sr. nasceu em 20 de março de 1568, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Parker, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margery Patch, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Dennis em 25 de setembro de 1600, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Biddeford Pool, Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1636. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1651, em Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Saint George's Church, Georgeham, North: ст джеорге'с чурч, джеоргэам, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Parker Sr. родился 20 марта 1568 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени James Parker было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Patch, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Dennis 25 сентября 1600 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности биддефорд пул, биддефорд, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1636 году. Он умер октябрь 1651 г. в местности джеоргетоун, сагадахок, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности джеоргетоун, сагадахок, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.Winter Harbor, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: Biddeford Pool, Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
es.Saint George's Church, Georgeham, North: St George's Church, Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Parker Sr. nació el 20 de marzo de 1568, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, James Parker, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margery Patch, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Katherine Dennis el 25 de septiembre de 1600, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Biddeford Pool, Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1636. Murió en octubre de 1651, en Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Estados Unidos.
